name: ashlr-stack-mcp
description: MCP server for Ashlr Stack. Exposes 19 tools and 3 resources so Claude Code / Cursor / Windsurf / Codex can provision every third-party service in a project with one call.

scripts.build: bun build src/server.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/server.js';let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(c.startsWith('#!'))c=c.slice(c.indexOf('\n')+1);fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c);fs.chmodSync(f,0o755)"
